recipe.title: Leek & potato soup
recipe.description: Everybody needs a good vegetable soup recipe in their repertoire, and this trusty leek & potato soup recipe is a good one. From Jamie's Ministry of Food.

ingredients.name: organic chicken or vegetable stock cubes

steps.descr: Trim, peel and roughly slice the celery
steps.instructions: Trim, peel and roughly slice the celery. Peel and roughly chop the onions. Peel and finely slice the garlic.

on_enter.say: Trim, peel and roughly slice the celery. Peel and roughly chop the onions. Peel and finely slice the garlic.

steps.descr: Cut the ends off the leeks, quarter them lengthways,...
steps.instructions: Cut the ends off the leeks, quarter them lengthways, wash them under running water and cut them into 1cm slices.

on_enter.say: Cut the ends off the leeks, quarter them lengthways, wash them under running water and cut them into 1cm slices.

steps.descr: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large pan on a high heat,...
steps.instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large pan on a high heat, add all the chopped and sliced ingredients and cook with the lid ajar for 10 minutes, or until softened, stirring regularly.

on_enter.say: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large pan on a high heat, add all the chopped and sliced ingredients and cook with the lid ajar for 10 minutes, or until softened, stirring regularly.

steps.descr: Meanwhile, peel the potatoes and cut them into 1cm cubes
steps.instructions: Meanwhile, peel the potatoes and cut them into 1cm cubes.

on_enter.say: Meanwhile, peel the potatoes and cut them into 1cm cubes.

steps.descr: Put the stock cubes into a jug or pan, pour in 1
steps.instructions: Put the stock cubes into a jug or pan, pour in 1.8 litres of boiling water and stir to dissolve, then pour into the veg pan.

on_enter.say: Put the stock cubes into a jug or pan, pour in 1.8 litres of boiling water and stir to dissolve, then pour into the veg pan.

steps.instructions: Add the potatoes. Bring to the boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes with the lid on, then remove from the heat.

on_enter.say: Add the potatoes. Bring to the boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes with the lid on, then remove from the heat.

steps.descr: Season to taste with sea salt and black pepper, then...
steps.instructions: Season to taste with sea salt and black pepper, then either serve like this or pulse until smooth using a stick blender or liquidizer.

on_enter.say: Season to taste with sea salt and black pepper, then either serve like this or pulse until smooth using a stick blender or liquidizer.
